name: MigrationManager
summary: This class contains methods and properties used for migration of Dynamo workspaces.

constructors.name: MigrationManager(Dynamo.Migration.MigrationManager.FutureFileCallback, Dynamo.Migration.MigrationManager.ObsoleteFileCallback)
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of Dynamo.Migration.MigrationManager class

params.name: displayFutureFileMessage
params.doc: Functions that can be used as a callback in the event a file from a later version of Dynamo is attempting to be loaded

params.name: displayObsoleteFileMessage
params.doc: Functions that can be used as a callback in the event an obsolete file is attempted to be loaded.

methods.name: AddMigrationType(Dynamo.Graph.Nodes.TypeLoadData)
methods.signature: void AddMigrationType(Dynamo.Graph.Nodes.TypeLoadData t)
methods.summary: Adds a new type containing Migration methods into this manager.

params.name: t
params.doc: Type data to add

methods.name: CloneAndChangeName(System.Xml.XmlElement, string, string, bool)
methods.signature: System.Xml.XmlElement CloneAndChangeName(System.Xml.XmlElement element, string type, string name, bool cloneInnerXml)
methods.summary: Call this method to create a clone of the original XmlElement and change its type at one go. This method preserves all the attributes while updating only the type name.

params.name: element
params.doc: The XmlElement to be cloned and the type name updated.

params.name: type
params.doc: The fully qualified name of the new type.

params.name: name
params.doc: The new name, by which this node is known.

params.name: cloneInnerXml
params.doc: Parameter indicating whether the inner xml of the original node should be cloned.

returns.doc: Returns the cloned and updated XmlElement.

methods.name: CreateCodeBlockNodeFrom(System.Xml.XmlElement)
methods.signature: System.Xml.XmlElement CreateCodeBlockNodeFrom(System.Xml.XmlElement srcElement)
methods.summary: Call this method to create an empty Code Block node, with all attributes carried over from an existing src XmlElement.

params.name: srcElement
params.doc: The source element from which the Code Block node XmlElement is constructed. All attributes of the source XmlElement will be copied over, and Code Block node specific attributes will be added.

returns.doc: Returns an XmlElement that represents the resulting Code Block node.

methods.name: CreateCodeBlockNodeModelNode(System.Xml.XmlDocument, System.Xml.XmlElement, int, string)
methods.signature: System.Xml.XmlElement CreateCodeBlockNodeModelNode(System.Xml.XmlDocument document, System.Xml.XmlElement oldNode, int nodeIndex, string codeText)
methods.summary: This method creates an empty CodeBlockNodeModel node that contains basic code block node information.

params.name: document
params.doc: The XmlDocument to create the node in.

params.name: oldNode
params.doc: Base node to create a new one

params.name: nodeIndex
params.doc: Index of the node

params.name: codeText
params.doc: Code block content

returns.doc: Returns the XmlElement that represents a CodeBlockNodeModel node with its basic function information with default attributes.

methods.name: CreateCustomNodeFrom(System.Xml.XmlDocument, System.Xml.XmlElement, string, string, string, System.Collections.Generic.List<string>, System.Collections.Generic.List<string>)
methods.signature: System.Xml.XmlElement CreateCustomNodeFrom(System.Xml.XmlDocument document, System.Xml.XmlElement srcElement, string id, string name, string description, System.Collections.Generic.List<string> inputs, System.Collections.Generic.List<string> outputs)
methods.summary: Create a custom node as a replacement for an existing node.

params.name: document
params.doc: The XmlDocument to create the node in.

params.name: srcElement
params.doc: The source XmlElement object.

params.name: id
params.doc: The custom node id.

params.name: name
params.doc: The custom node name.

params.name: description
params.doc: The custom node's description.

params.name: inputs
params.doc: A list of input names.

params.name: outputs
params.doc: A list of output names.

returns.doc: Returns the XmlElement that represents a custom node with its basic function information with default attributes.

methods.name: CreateDummyNode(System.Xml.XmlElement, int, int)
methods.signature: System.Xml.XmlElement CreateDummyNode(System.Xml.XmlElement element, int inportCount, int outportCount)
methods.summary: Call this method to create a dummy node, should a node failed to be migrated. This results in a dummy node with a description of what the original node type was, and also retain the number of input and output ports.

params.name: element
params.doc: XmlElement representing the original node which has failed migration.

params.name: inportCount
params.doc: The number of input ports required on the new dummy node. This number must be a positive number greater or equal to zero.

params.name: outportCount
params.doc: The number of output ports required on the new dummy node. This number must be a positive number greater or equal to zero.

returns.doc: Returns a new XmlElement representing the dummy node.

methods.name: CreateFunctionNode(System.Xml.XmlDocument, System.Xml.XmlElement, int, string, string, string)
methods.signature: System.Xml.XmlElement CreateFunctionNode(System.Xml.XmlDocument document, System.Xml.XmlElement oldNode, int nodeIndex, string assembly, string name, string signature)
methods.summary: Call this method to create an empty DSFunction node that contains basic function node information.

params.name: document
params.doc: The XmlDocument to create the node in.

params.name: oldNode
params.doc: Base node to create a new one

params.name: nodeIndex
params.doc: Index of the node

params.name: assembly
params.doc: Name of the assembly that implements this function.

params.name: name
params.doc: The name to display on the node.

params.name: signature
params.doc: The signature of the function.

returns.doc: Returns the XmlElement that represents a DSFunction node with its basic function information with default attributes.

methods.name: CreateFunctionNodeFrom(System.Xml.XmlElement)
methods.signature: System.Xml.XmlElement CreateFunctionNodeFrom(System.Xml.XmlElement srcElement)
methods.summary: Call this method to create a duplicated XmlElement with all the attributes found from the source XmlElement.

params.name: srcElement
params.doc: The source XmlElement to duplicate.

returns.doc: Returns the duplicated XmlElement with all attributes found in the source XmlElement. The resulting XmlElement will also have a mandatory "type" attribute with value "Dynamo.Graph.Nodes.ZeroTouch.DSFunction".

methods.name: CreateFunctionNodeFrom(System.Xml.XmlElement, string[])
methods.signature: System.Xml.XmlElement CreateFunctionNodeFrom(System.Xml.XmlElement srcElement, string[] attribNames)
methods.summary: Call this method to create a XmlElement with a set of attributes carried over from the source XmlElement. The new XmlElement will have a name of "Dynamo.Graph.Nodes.ZeroTouch.DSFunction".

params.name: srcElement
params.doc: The source XmlElement object.

params.name: attribNames
params.doc: The list of attribute names whose values are to be carried over to the resulting XmlElement. This list is mandatory and it cannot be empty. If a specified attribute cannot be found in srcElement, an empty attribute with the same name will be created in the resulting XmlElement.

returns.doc: Returns the resulting XmlElement with specified attributes duplicated from srcElement. The resulting XmlElement will also have a mandatory "type" attribute with value "Dynamo.Graph.Nodes.ZeroTouch.DSFunction".

methods.name: CreateMissingNode(System.Xml.XmlElement, int, int)
methods.signature: System.Xml.XmlElement CreateMissingNode(System.Xml.XmlElement element, int inportCount, int outportCount)
methods.summary: Call this method to create a dummy node, should a node failed to be migrated. This results in a dummy node with a description of what the original node type was, and also retain the number of input and output ports.

params.name: element
params.doc: XmlElement representing the original node which has failed migration.

params.name: inportCount
params.doc: The number of input ports required on the new dummy node. This number must be a positive number greater or equal to zero.

params.name: outportCount
params.doc: The number of output ports required on the new dummy node. This number must be a positive number greater or equal to zero.

returns.doc: Returns a new XmlElement representing the dummy node.

methods.name: CreateNode(System.Xml.XmlDocument, System.Xml.XmlElement, int, string, string)
methods.signature: System.Xml.XmlElement CreateNode(System.Xml.XmlDocument document, System.Xml.XmlElement oldNode, int nodeIndex, string type, string name)
methods.summary: This method creates an empty NodeModel node that contains basic code block node information.

params.name: document
params.doc: The XmlDocument to create the node in.

params.name: oldNode
params.doc: Base node to create a new one

params.name: nodeIndex
params.doc: Index of the node

params.name: type
params.doc: Node type name

params.name: name
params.doc: Name to display on the node

returns.doc: Returns the XmlElement that represents a NodeModel node with its basic function information with default attributes.

methods.name: CreateVarArgFunctionNode(System.Xml.XmlDocument, System.Xml.XmlElement, int, string, string, string, string)
methods.signature: System.Xml.XmlElement CreateVarArgFunctionNode(System.Xml.XmlDocument document, System.Xml.XmlElement oldNode, int nodeIndex, string assembly, string name, string signature, string inputcount)
methods.summary: Call this method to create an empty DSVarArgFunction node that contains basic function node information.

params.name: document
params.doc: The XmlDocument to create the node in.

params.name: oldNode
params.doc: Base node to create a new one

params.name: nodeIndex
params.doc: Index of the node

params.name: assembly
params.doc: Name of the assembly that implements this function.

params.name: name
params.doc: The name to display on the node.

params.name: signature
params.doc: The signature of the function.

returns.doc: Returns the XmlElement that represents a DSVarArgFunction node with its basic function information with default attributes.

methods.name: CreateVarArgFunctionNodeFrom(System.Xml.XmlElement)
methods.signature: System.Xml.XmlElement CreateVarArgFunctionNodeFrom(System.Xml.XmlElement srcElement)
methods.summary: This method creates a duplicated XmlElement representing DSVarArgFunction with all the attributes found from the source XmlElement.

params.name: srcElement
params.doc: The source XmlElement to duplicate.

returns.doc: Returns the duplicated XmlElement representing DSVarArgFunction with all attributes found in the source XmlElement. The resulting XmlElement will also have a mandatory "type" attribute with value "Dynamo.Graph.Nodes.ZeroTouch.DSVarArgFunction".

methods.name: GetGuidFromXmlElement(System.Xml.XmlElement)
methods.signature: string GetGuidFromXmlElement(System.Xml.XmlElement element)
methods.summary: Returns node guid specified in given System.Xml.XmlElement

params.name: element
params.doc: System.Xml.XmlElement containing node guid

methods.name: MigrateXmlNode(System.Version, System.Xml.XmlNode, System.Type, System.Version)
methods.signature: Dynamo.Migration.NodeMigrationData MigrateXmlNode(System.Version currentVersion, System.Xml.XmlNode elNode, System.Type type, System.Version workspaceVersion)
methods.summary: Attempts to migrate a node to the current version of Dynamo by given xml data

params.name: currentVersion
params.doc: Current Dynamo version

params.name: elNode
params.doc: Xml data about node to migrate

params.name: type
params.doc: Type of node

params.name: workspaceVersion
params.doc: Version of workspace which the node belongs to

returns.doc: Data about migration of the node

methods.name: ProcessNodesInWorkspace(System.Xml.XmlDocument, System.Version, System.Version, Dynamo.Graph.Nodes.NodeLoaders.NodeFactory)
methods.signature: void ProcessNodesInWorkspace(System.Xml.XmlDocument xmlDoc, System.Version workspaceVersion, System.Version currentVersion, Dynamo.Graph.Nodes.NodeLoaders.NodeFactory nodeFactory)
methods.summary: Attempts to migrate nodes in a workspace to the current version of Dynamo.

params.name: xmlDoc
params.doc: Xml data about workspace with nodes to migrate

params.name: workspaceVersion
params.doc: Version of workspace to migrate

params.name: currentVersion
params.doc: Current Dynamo version

params.name: nodeFactory
params.doc: Factory to create nodes

methods.name: ProcessWorkspace(Dynamo.Graph.Workspaces.WorkspaceInfo, System.Xml.XmlDocument, bool, Dynamo.Graph.Nodes.NodeLoaders.NodeFactory)
methods.signature: bool ProcessWorkspace(Dynamo.Graph.Workspaces.WorkspaceInfo workspaceInfo, System.Xml.XmlDocument xmlDoc, bool isTestMode, Dynamo.Graph.Nodes.NodeLoaders.NodeFactory factory)
methods.summary: Attempts to migrate a workspace to the current version of Dynamo.

params.name: workspaceInfo
params.doc: Information about workspace to migrate

params.name: xmlDoc
params.doc: Xml data about workspace to migrate

params.name: isTestMode
params.doc: Indicates if current code is running in tests

params.name: factory
params.doc: Factory to create nodes

returns.doc: True if the workspace is migrated successfully

methods.name: ProcessWorkspaceMigrations(System.Version, System.Xml.XmlDocument, System.Version)
methods.signature: void ProcessWorkspaceMigrations(System.Version currentVersion, System.Xml.XmlDocument xmlDoc, System.Version workspaceVersion)
methods.summary: Runs all migration methods found on the listed migration target types.

params.name: currentVersion
params.doc: Current Dynamo version

params.name: xmlDoc
params.doc: Xml data about workspace to migrate

params.name: workspaceVersion
params.doc: Version of workspace to migrate

methods.name: ReplaceAttributeValue(System.Xml.XmlElement, string, string, string)
methods.signature: void ReplaceAttributeValue(System.Xml.XmlElement element, string attribute, string from, string to)
methods.summary: Call this method to replace the value of attribute.

params.name: element
params.doc: Xml element where to replace attribute value

params.name: attribute
params.doc: Attribute name

params.name: from
params.doc: Original value

params.name: to
params.doc: New value

methods.name: SetFunctionSignature(System.Xml.XmlElement, string, string, string)
methods.signature: void SetFunctionSignature(System.Xml.XmlElement element, string assemblyName, string methodName, string signature)
methods.summary: Sets function data such as assembly, display name and function signature

params.name: element
params.doc: Xml element where to set data

params.name: assemblyName
params.doc: Assembly name of the function

params.name: methodName
params.doc: Name of the function

params.name: signature
params.doc: FullName of the function

properties.name: MigrationTargets
properties.summary: A collection of types which contain migration methods.
